identity.name: Cubic Logistics
identity.description: A high-end, reliable logistics partner. The design fuses the weight of physical infrastructure with the precision of modern data.

usage.h1: font-heading font-bold text-5xl md:text-7xl uppercase tracking-tight text-foreground
usage.h2: font-heading font-semibold text-4xl md:text-5xl uppercase tracking-tight text-foreground/90
usage.h3: font-heading font-medium text-2xl md:text-3xl uppercase tracking-normal text-foreground/80
usage.caption: font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground/70

strategies.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 auto-rows-[minmax(200px,auto)]
strategies.asymmetry: Use offset layouts where image takes 5 cols and text takes 7 cols (or vice versa) to create tension.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 font-heading uppercase tracking-wide rounded-none px-8 py-6 h-auto text-lg transition-all duration-300 ease-out hover:tracking-widest
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 font-heading uppercase tracking-wide rounded-none px-8 py-6 h-auto text-lg border border-secondary
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-primary-foreground font-heading uppercase tracking-wide rounded-none px-8 py-6 h-auto transition-all

cards.style: bg-card border border-border/40 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-500 rounded-none p-8 flex flex-col gap-4 group relative overflow-hidden
cards.hover_effect: Add a subtle 'primary' colored glow or line that appears on hover.

inputs.style: bg-background border-b-2 border-border focus:border-primary px-0 py-4 rounded-none transition-all placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 focus:ring-0

contact_info.address: 12/2, Munusamy Kovil Street, Menamedu Main Road, Ambattur, Chennai, Tamil Nadu - 600053

visual_enhancers.overlays: Use a subtle grain texture overlay (opacity 0.05) on solid colors to give an 'industrial paper' feel.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use 'Lucide React' with 'stroke-1' for a thin, technical look.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'border-l-4' (left border 4px) in Gold for key cards to simulate folders/files.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE tailwind.config.js with the colors and fonts specified.
2. ADD the font imports to index.css or index.html immediately.
3. IMPLEMENT 'Layout' component that includes the Sticky Header and Heavy Footer.
4. USE the 'image_urls' provided for specific sections.
5. FORMS: Use Shadcn Form components but style them with the 'inputs' style defined above (bottom border only, no box).
6. MAP: Use the provided embed URL in an iframe for the Contact page.
7. QUOTE: Ensure the form collects necessary logistics data (Origin, Destination, Weight, Type) and simulates sending to admin@cubiclogistics.net.
8. THEME: Default to LIGHT mode but build with dark mode capabilities using the variables provided.
9. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
